asset.title: Two Client Live Sync
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: Excellent demonstration of real-time multi-client synchronization and agent interaction. The side-by-side layout and selective zooming make the complex workflow easy to follow.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly shows Client A and Client B syncing messages and spreadsheet state changes in real-time.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full loop: message input, instant sync, agent invocation, and live cell updates.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean side-by-side presentation with helpful zoom-ins on active areas to maintain focus.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of collaborative spreadsheets and agent-led automation.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity capture of actual UI interactions and real-time state synchronization.

legibility.evidence: Text is small in the full-screen overview, but the video compensates well by zooming in on active panels.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating multi-user collaboration and automated financial reconciliation.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the live synchronization speed and agent execution steps.

observedEvidence: Side-by-side Client A and Client B windows showing real-time message delivery
Live cell locking and automated variance calculation by the server-led agent across both clients

defects.observed: The initial full-screen view has very small text that may be difficult to read on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Consider starting with a slightly tighter crop or increasing the default UI scaling for the demo recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's live synchronization in action as two clients collaborate and a server-led agent updates spreadsheet cells in real-time.
